description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle ("Cruise AV"), operating in driverless autonomous mode, was traveling eastbound on Bryant Street in the 
rightmost lane between 11th Street and 10th Street. As the Cruise AV proceeded straight into the intersection with 10th Street, a semi-trailer 
truck traveling in the lane to the left of the Cruise AV began to make a right turn onto 10th Street and crossed into the Cruise AV’s lane 
without a turn signal. The Cruise AV braked and the semi-trailer truck made contact with the left side of the Cruise AV, causing damage to 
the driver side front, rear, and bumper of the Cruise AV. The parties exchanged information and there were no injuries.
Print
Clear Form
